ddls:
CREATE TABLE "words" (
  "word_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each word */,
  "word" TEXT /* The word itself */,
  "bigram_count" INTEGER /* Count of bigrams associated with the word */,
  "subtlex_frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of the word in the SUBTLEX dataset */,
  "part_of_speech" TEXT /* Part of speech of the word */,
  "word_length" INTEGER /* Length of the word */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language the word belongs to */,
  "corpus_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the corpus from which the word is derived */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the word entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the word entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("word_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_words_corpus_id FOREIGN KEY ("corpus_id") REFERENCES corpora ("corpus_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "word_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric record */,
  "word_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the word being measured */,
  "concreteness_mean" REAL /* Mean concreteness score of the word */,
  "concreteness_sd" REAL /* Standard deviation of the concreteness score */,
  "unknown_count" INTEGER /* Count of unknown responses for the word */,
  "total_count" INTEGER /* Total count of responses for the word */,
  "percent_known" REAL /* Percentage of known responses */,
  "age_of_acquisition" REAL /* Average age at which the word is typically learned */,
  "imageability" REAL /* Imageability score of the word */,
  "familiarity" REAL /* Familiarity score of the word */,
  "phonetic_complexity" REAL /* Phonetic complexity score of the word */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_word_metrics_word_id FOREIGN KEY ("word_id") REFERENCES words ("word_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bigram_analysis" (
  "bigram_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bigram record */,
  "word_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the word associated with the bigram */,
  "bigram" TEXT /* The bigram itself */,
  "bigram_count" INTEGER /* Count of occurrences for the bigram */,
  "corpus_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the corpus from which the bigram is derived */,
  "context_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the context in which the bigram appears */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the bigram analysis entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the bigram analysis entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bigram_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bigram_analysis_context_id FOREIGN KEY ("context_id") REFERENCES contexts ("context_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bigram_analysis_corpus_id FOREIGN KEY ("corpus_id") REFERENCES corpora ("corpus_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bigram_analysis_word_id FOREIGN KEY ("word_id") REFERENCES words ("word_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "corpora" (
  "corpus_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each corpus */,
  "corpus_name" TEXT /* Name of the corpus */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the corpus */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the corpus entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the corpus entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("corpus_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contexts" (
  "context_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each context */,
  "context_name" TEXT /* Name of the context */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the context */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the context entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the context entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("context_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, researcher) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_corpora_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "corpus_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the corpus */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level (e.g., read, write) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_corpora_access_corpus_id FOREIGN KEY ("corpus_id") REFERENCES corpora ("corpus_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_corpora_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
